checks.name: view_safety_ceiling
checks.description: View is only allowed when projectStatus is Active, user is in one of the three permitted roles, and role-specific constraints are met (ClinicalResearcher: clearance>3 & not HighlyRestricted; PI: riskScore<20 & compliant device; SponsorRep: Phase-3 only)

checks.name: edit_safety_ceiling
checks.description: Edit is only allowed when projectStatus is Active, user is ClinicalResearcher or PrincipalInvestigator (not SponsorRep), and role-specific constraints are met

checks.name: cross_dept_block_view_safety
checks.description: View is forbidden when department != projectManagingDepartment unless user is GlobalAuditor or SponsorRepresentative

checks.name: cross_dept_block_edit_safety
checks.description: Edit is forbidden when department != projectManagingDepartment unless user is GlobalAuditor

checks.name: sponsor_no_edit_safety
checks.description: A SponsorRepresentative who is not also in ClinicalResearcher or PrincipalInvestigator roles should never be granted Edit access solely via SponsorRepresentative path. Ceiling: Edit requires CR or PI membership.

checks.name: floor_clinical_researcher_view
checks.description: A ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel>3, matching department, active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc, compliant context MUST be able to View

checks.name: floor_pi_view
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with riskScore<20, compliant device, matching department, active project MUST be able to View

checks.name: floor_sponsor_view
checks.description: A SponsorRepresentative viewing a Phase-3 doc in an active project MUST be allowed (regardless of department)

checks.name: floor_clinical_researcher_edit
checks.description: A ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel>3, matching department, active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to Edit

checks.name: floor_pi_edit
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with riskScore<20, compliant device, matching department, active project MUST be able to Edit

checks.name: floor_global_auditor_cross_dept_view
checks.description: A GlobalAuditor who is also a ClinicalResearcher (clearance>3, non-HighlyRestricted, active project) MUST be able to View even across departments

checks.name: liveness_view
checks.description: View policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_edit
checks.description: Edit policy is not trivially deny-all

results.description: View is only allowed when projectStatus is Active, user is in one of the three permitted roles, and role-specific constraints are met (ClinicalResearcher: clearance>3 & not HighlyRestricted; PI: riskScore<20 & compliant device; SponsorRep: Phase-3 only)
Edit is only allowed when projectStatus is Active, user is ClinicalResearcher or PrincipalInvestigator (not SponsorRep), and role-specific constraints are met
View is forbidden when department != projectManagingDepartment unless user is GlobalAuditor or SponsorRepresentative
Edit is forbidden when department != projectManagingDepartment unless user is GlobalAuditor

A SponsorRepresentative who is not also in ClinicalResearcher or PrincipalInvestigator roles should never be granted Edit access solely via SponsorRepresentative path. Ceiling: Edit requires CR or PI membership.
A ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel>3, matching department, active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc, compliant context MUST be able to View
A PrincipalInvestigator with riskScore<20, compliant device, matching department, active project MUST be able to View
A SponsorRepresentative viewing a Phase-3 doc in an active project MUST be allowed (regardless of department)
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD
  Counterexample found:
principal: User::"", action: Action::"View", resource: Document::""
context: {isCompliantDevice: true, networkRiskScore: -1}
entities: [
  Role::"ClinicalResearcher",
  Role::"PrincipalInvestigator",
  User::"" in [Role::"SponsorRepresentative"] {
    clearanceLevel: -1,
    department: "SponsorRepresentative",
  },
  Action::"View",
  Role::"GlobalAuditor",
  Action::"Edit",
  Role::"SponsorRepresentative",
  Document::"" {
    classification: "",
    projectManagingDepartment: "",
    projectStatus: "Active",
    studyPhase: "Phase-3",
  },
]

results.description: A ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel>3, matching department, active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to Edit

entities: [

    classification: "",
    projectManagingDepartment: "",
    projectStatus: "Active",
    studyPhase: "A",
  },
  Action::"View",
  Role::"ClinicalResearcher",
  Action::"Edit",
  Role::"PrincipalInvestigator",
  Role::"GlobalAuditor",
  User::"" in [Role::"ClinicalResearcher", Role::"SponsorRepresentative"] {
    clearanceLevel: 9223372036854775807,
    department: "",
  },
  Role::"SponsorRepresentative",
]

results.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with riskScore<20, compliant device, matching department, active project MUST be able to Edit

results.description: A GlobalAuditor who is also a ClinicalResearcher (clearance>3, non-HighlyRestricted, active project) MUST be able to View even across departments
